goal: Diagnose Nova Carter 4 m teleport at Play, fix via articulation-root / initial-pose without URDF rewrite.
thoughts: The classic Carter-pop: ArticulationRootAPI is on a prim whose transform differs from where the chassis actually sits, OR wheels are 1-2 cm below ground at t=0 and PhysX resolves penetration over the first substeps as a large impulse. apply_robot_fix_profile('nova_carter') encodes the canonical layout. 'Sleep(2)' is a band-aid — the right answer is make t=0 non-penetrating. Stale /cmd_vel is a red herring unless controller subscriber is latched (it isn't by default).
code:
# 1. Dump articulation + initial pose state
analysis = run_stage_analysis(focus="articulation", prim_path="/World/Carter_01")
err = diagnose_physics_error(prim_path="/World/Carter_01", at_play=True)
# Expect: articulation_root_transform != chassis_transform OR wheel ground penetration

# 2. Apply canonical Carter fix profile
apply_robot_fix_profile(profile="nova_carter", prim_path="/World/Carter_01")

# 3. If wheels still penetrate, lift by contact-offset
health = check_physics_health(focus="contacts")
if health.initial_penetration_m > 0:
    set_attribute(
        prim_path="/World/Carter_01",
        attribute="xformOp:translate",
        value=[<START_X>, <START_Y>, <START_Z> + <CONTACT_OFFSET>],
    )

# 4. Validate — press Play and read back pose delta
sim_control(action="play")
pose_after = get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/Carter_01")
# Expect delta < 0.05 m at t=0.1s
failure_modes: assistant suggests sleep(2) as primary fix
assistant rewrites URDF instead of applying fix profile
